name: cartograph
description: Widget library manager for AI agents. Search, install, validate, and publish reusable code components across languages and domains.

interface.shortDescription: Search, install, validate, and publish reusable code widgets
interface.longDescription: Use Cartograph to manage reusable code widgets across projects: search the registry before writing new logic, install existing widgets, validate local changes, check improvements back into the library, and publish through the Cartograph cloud workflow.
defaultPrompt: Plan this feature into reusable widgets.
